---
name: source-intake
description: Use when the user provides new files, folders, SharePoint exports, or unknown source material.
---

# Source Intake Skill

Use this skill to gather evidence for the Orchestrator.

1. Use `profile_source_package` to inspect file types and tabular structures.
2. Use `convert_documents` when the agent needs markdown previews.
3. Report observations and uncertainties to the Orchestrator.
4. Do not choose the actuarial method or final output.
